channel.title: How to deploy a headless site for WordPress to the cloud for free with Frontity and Zeit Now
channel.description:
Hey!
Just wanted to share this guide that [403page](https://403page.com/) (thank you! 🙌) wrote:
https://403page.com/how-to-deploy-a-headless-site-for-wordpress-to-the-cloud-for-free-with-frontity-and-zeit-now/.
